heading: Separability
label: 3076 Separability
text: If any provision of this chapter or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, the validity of the remainder of the chapter and of the application of such provision to other persons and circumstances shall not be affected thereby.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the National Security Act of 1947, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 26, 1947, ch. 34361 Stat. 495
CodificationSection was formerly classified as a note under prior to editorial reclassification as this section.section 401 of this title
